channel.title: Derek Wakefield
channel.description: Assistant Professor of Political Science, Bucknell University

item.title: Seven design directions
item.description:
Seven visual directions for derekwakefield.com, each anchored to a different parable or piece of the canon. Trimmed from an earlier set of ten — these are the survivors headed for a Style toggle on the live site.

Open locally — no internet required after the page loads, since each mockup is inlined.

✦   Open the comparison board    or download HTML →

The seven directions:

  • Porch Light — small voice, on a porch, with one bulb above the door
  • Star Chart — deep night, scholarly astrolabe, nav as constellation
  • Bedrock — heavy slab serif, geological strata, gravity-anchored
  • Hum — soft peach, dusty plum, continuous low-volume wave
  • Bobblesphere — orbital rings, radial nav, sections as planets
  • Library Bookmark — card catalog, dotted dividers, archival quiet
  • Mind Palace Map — antique cartography, compass rose, framed scholarly plate

item.title: Wor Gems
item.description:
A WarPips-inspired isometric auto-battler. Pick a banner — Tonric Concord, Wildfire Ascension, or Renkindled Mist — and deploy soldiers, miners, snipers, tanks, mechs, helicopters, and airplanes into a destructible battlefield. Anti-air units engage AIR; ground units stay in their lane. Cover blocks 50% of incoming damage, but every prop on the field is destructible. Projectiles track their targets. Each unit type has its own idle animation.

Built on top of the Gem in Eyes engine canon. Lore-anchored in the bobology.

Download and open locally — no internet required.

⬇   Download HTML    or open in browser →

Controls: Q W E R T Y U deploy units · click cards to deploy · units auto-engage at range · seek cover when fighting · AA-flagged units engage AIR.

Factions:

  • Tonric Concord — heavy, durable, arrives. HP +15%, SPD −15%.
  • Wildfire Ascension — glass cannon. ATK +20%, SPD +25%, HP −15%.
  • Renkindled Mist — long-shot, sustain. RNG +10%, COST −5%.

Balance vetted against 10,000 AI-vs-AI matches; faction winrates landed at 50% / 41% / 59%.

item.title: Mind Palace
item.description:
A research-grade visualization built around CES (Cooperative Election Study) data, packaged as one self-contained HTML page. The companion Python pipeline shapes the data; the page renders the result.

Download and open locally — no internet connection required after download.

⬇   Download HTML    or open in browser →

item.title: Gem in Eyes — an introduction
item.description:
A small light in a deep room. A cube of stone with five lit corners and one quiet pocket at the center. You hum, and the room hums back. Five gods — Lik, Ton, Ren, Nif, Eye — keep the corners lit.

This piece is a self-contained HTML file. Download it and open it locally in any browser.

⬇   Download HTML    or open in browser →
